meta.title: Sirat — Open-Source Self-Control App for Android
meta.description: Sirat: Your first step towards a purer, more balanced life. An open-source Android app for self-control, app locking, internet filtering, and a smart AI assistant.

sideRail.left: App Lock · VPN · AI · Self-Control · Full Privacy

hero.description: Sirat is a free, open-source Android app that helps you with self-control, time management, and blocking unwanted content — your data stays on your device, and the AI assistant works via OpenRouter.ai with your own API key.

features.description: Six tools working together to help you achieve your goals — your data stays on your device, and the AI assistant works via OpenRouter.ai with your own API key.
features.card1Desc: Lock any app with a PIN, text password, or fingerprint — a strong psychological barrier that prevents random access.
features.card2Desc: Link the app to a trusted supervisor via QR code. Only the supervisor can modify settings and unlock locked apps.
features.card3Desc: A local VPN that filters unwanted content — pornography, gambling, social media — with custom manual lists.
features.card4Desc: Track daily usage patterns, interactive charts, and export CSV reports to understand your habits and monitor progress.
features.card5Desc: An AI assistant via OpenRouter that analyzes your habits and creates a custom recovery plan exportable as PDF.
features.card6Desc: Prevents uninstalling protected apps via Device Admin and Shizuku — continuous protection that cannot be circumvented.

walkthrough.description: Discover every screen in Sirat — from app management to the AI assistant and the filtering dashboard.
walkthrough.desc1Text: The main screen displays all protected apps. You can enable/disable general protection, add new apps, and search easily.
walkthrough.desc2Text: Local VPN control panel: enable/disable filtering, choose blocked categories, and view the blocked sites log.
walkthrough.desc3Text: A smart assistant powered by OpenRouter models — analyzes your logs, builds a custom recovery plan, and accompanies you through conversation.
walkthrough.desc4Text: A monthly calendar to log your behaviors, weekly/monthly/yearly charts, and complete CSV export for backup.
walkthrough.desc5Text: A unique system: a trusted person holds the QR code — only they can unlock apps. Perfect for parents and supportive friends.

requirements.sysReq1: Requires Android 10+ — optimized for Android 14 and above
requirements.sysReq3: Supports Shizuku and Device Admin for advanced control
requirements.sysReq4: Supports Android for Work for professional environments
requirements.sysReq5: MIT license — completely free to use, modify, and distribute
requirements.privacy1: All data is processed locally on your device — the AI assistant works via OpenRouter.ai with your own API key
requirements.privacy2: Internet filtering via local VPN — data traffic doesn't pass through external servers
requirements.privacy3: AI assistant with your own API key — nothing is uploaded to the cloud without your permission
requirements.privacy4: Source code is fully open — you can review every line of code
requirements.privacy5: No ads, no data tracking, and no sharing with third parties

cta.headline: Sirat
cta.description: A free, open-source app — no hidden terms, no ads, no tracking. AI assistant via OpenRouter.ai.

footer.brandDesc: An open-source self-control app for Android — helps you block unwanted content, lock apps, and build healthy habits. Your privacy is fully preserved.
